headline: Conagra Volume Growth And AI Project Catalyst Test Margin Ambitions
summary: Conagra Brands (NYSE:CAG) reports a return to portfolio volume growth, with snacks and frozen products as key contributors. Management highlights that 88% of its snacks and frozen portfolio is holding or gaining market share. The company is rolling out an AI driven initiative, Project Catalyst, aimed at reengineering internal work processes. Leadership reiterates its focus on snacks and frozen, alongside goals for margin expansion and productivity gains. For you as an investor, the latest...
